title: marsdenia cavaleriei
intro: Marsdenia cavaleriei, a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, is also known as Chinese milk vine or Tie Luo Xin. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to calm the nervous system and reduce fever. The health benefits of Marsdenia cavaleriei include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. In herbal preparations, Marsdenia cavaleriei is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
